zh.lifeSummary: 當Ieuan Llwyd ap Llywelyn of Mathavarn於大約1305年出生在威爾士梅利奧爾時，他的父親Llywelyn ap Tudyr of Mathavarn32歲，母親Gwenllian ferch Llywelyn32歲。他於大約1357年與Mabli II ferch Philip在英國威爾斯蒙格莫利夏爾蒙哥馬利結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ieuan Llwyd ap Llywelyn of Mathavarn于大约1305年出生在威尔士梅利奧爾时，他的父亲Llywelyn ap Tudyr of Mathavarn32岁，母亲Gwenllian ferch Llywelyn32岁。他于大约1357年与Mabli II ferch Philip在英国威尔斯蒙格莫利夏爾蒙哥馬利结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Llywelyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Llewellyn
meanings: Welsh: from the personal name Llywelyn, derived from British Celtic Lugubelinos, itself from the divine name Lugus + an uncertain second element often used alone as a name. Through association with llew ‘lion’, it was altered to Llewelyn. This was the name of two princes of north Wales who held the Normans at bay for many years in the 13th century. Etymologically speaking, the form with a fourth -l- is an error, not found as an original Welsh name, but this is now much the most common spelling in the US.

nameMeanings.name: Ieuan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: John
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Ieuan Llwyd ap Llywelyn of Mathavarn was born about 1305, in Merionethshire, Wales, his father, Llywelyn ap Tudyr of Mathavarn, was 32 and his mother, Gwenllian ferch Llywelyn, was 32. He married Mabli II ferch Philip about 1357, in Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ieuan Llwyd ap Llywelyn of Mathavarn est né environ 1305, à Merionethshire, Galles, son père, Llywelyn ap Tudyr of Mathavarn, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Gwenllian ferch Llywelyn, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Mabli II ferch Philip environ 1357, à Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ieuan Llwyd ap Llywelyn of Mathavarn um 1305 in Merionethshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Llywelyn ap Tudyr of Mathavarn 32 und seine Mutter Gwenllian ferch Llywelyn 32. Er hat um 1357 in Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom Mabli II ferch Philip geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ieuan Llwyd ap Llywelyn of Mathavarn è nato il circa 1305 nel Merionethshire, Galles, il suo padre, Llywelyn ap Tudyr of Mathavarn, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Gwenllian ferch Llywelyn, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Mabli II ferch Philip circa 1357, nel Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia.

ja.lifeSummary: Ieuan Llwyd ap Llywelyn of Mathavarnが約1305年にウェールズメリオンエスシュアイアで生まれた時，父Llywelyn ap Tudyr of Mathavarnは32歳，母Gwenllian ferch Llywelynは32歳であった。約1357年にイギリスウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアモントゴメリーでMabli II ferch Philipと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Ieuan Llwyd ap Llywelyn of Mathavarn(이)가 대략 1305년 웨일스 머이오네스실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Llywelyn ap Tudyr of Mathavarn(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Gwenllian ferch Llywelyn(은)는 32세였다. 그는 대략 1357년 영국 웨일스 몽고머이실르 몽고메리에서 Mabli II ferch Philip(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ieuan Llwyd ap Llywelyn of Mathavarn nasceu aproximadamente 1305, em Merionethshire, Gales, seu pai, Llywelyn ap Tudyr of Mathavarn, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Gwenllian ferch Llywelyn, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Mabli II ferch Philip aproximadamente 1357, em Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ieuan Llwyd ap Llywelyn of Mathavarn родился около 1305 г. в местности мириоунетшир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Llywelyn ap Tudyr of Mathavarn было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Gwenllian ferch Llywelyn, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Mabli II ferch Philip около 1357 г. в местности монтгомири, монтгомиришир, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ieuan Llwyd ap Llywelyn of Mathavarn nació aproximadamente 1305, en Merionethshire, Gales, su papá, Llywelyn ap Tudyr of Mathavarn, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Gwenllian ferch Llywelyn, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Mabli II ferch Philip aproximadamente 1357, en Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija.
